productDisplayName: Disney Kids Girl's Fun In The Fair Yellow Teen Kidswear
description: CompositionRound neck yellow top made of 100% cotton, with puffed sleeves, stretchable ruffles below the waist line, and bright chest and back neck printFittingRegularWash careMachine wash separately in cold waterUse mild detergentDo not bleachAvoid soaking Remove promptlyLine dry inside out in shade.Warm iron onlyDo not iron directly on print/embroideryLet your young lady go wild with joy in this pretty top from disney. The puffed sleeves with elastic ends Fit neatly around her arms, while the stretchable ruffles from the waist to the hem help accentuate her blooming beauty. The sparkling summery graphic makes your little princess look all the more stylish and energetic while she stays cool, fresh and dry in this cotton fabric piece. Pair this top with jeans and casual footwear that is available in a wide collection at myntra and watch your little girl transform into a gorgeous beauty.
